verses.arabicText: وَجَآءَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَن قَبْلَهُۥ وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَٰتُ بِٱلْخَاطِئَةِ
verses.translationText: And there came Pharaoh and those before him and the overturned cities with sin.

verses.arabicText: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةًۭ رَّابِيَةً
verses.translationText: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity].

verses.arabicText: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنَٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ
verses.translationText: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried your ancestors in the sailing ship

verses.arabicText: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةًۭ وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌۭ وَٰعِيَةٌۭ
verses.translationText: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it.

verses.arabicText: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌۭ وَٰحِدَةٌۭ
verses.translationText: Then when the Horn is blown with one blast

verses.arabicText: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ
verses.translationText: And the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow -

verses.arabicText: فَيَوْمَئِذٍۢ وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ
verses.translationText: Then on that Day, the Resurrection will occur,

verses.arabicText: وَٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَهِىَ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ وَاهِيَةٌۭ
verses.translationText: And the heaven will split [open], for that Day it is infirm.

verses.arabicText: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا ۚ وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ ثَمَٰنِيَةٌۭ
verses.translationText: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].

verses.arabicText: يَوْمَئِذٍۢ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌۭ
verses.translationText: That Day, you will be exhibited [for judgement]; not hidden among you is anything concealed.

verses.arabicText: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتَٰبِيَهْ
verses.translationText: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!

verses.arabicText: إِنِّى ظَنَنتُ أَنِّى مُلَٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهْ
verses.translationText: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account."

verses.arabicText: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍۢ رَّاضِيَةٍۢ
verses.translationText: So he will be in a pleasant life -

verses.arabicText: فِى جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍۢ
verses.translationText: In an elevated garden,

verses.arabicText: قُطُوفُهَا دَانِيَةٌۭ
verses.translationText: Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near.

verses.arabicText: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ
verses.translationText: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past."

verses.arabicText: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَٰبِيَهْ
verses.translationText: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record

verses.arabicText: وَلَمْ أَدْرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهْ
verses.translationText: And had not known what is my account.

verses.arabicText: يَٰلَيْتَهَا كَانَتِ ٱلْقَاضِيَةَ
verses.translationText: I wish my death had been the decisive one.

verses.arabicText: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنِّى مَالِيَهْ ۜ
verses.translationText: My wealth has not availed me.

verses.arabicText: هَلَكَ عَنِّى سُلْطَٰنِيَهْ
verses.translationText: Gone from me is my authority."

verses.arabicText: خُذُوهُ فَغُلُّوهُ
verses.translationText: [Allah will say], "Seize him and shackle him.

verses.arabicText: ثُمَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ صَلُّوهُ
verses.translationText: Then into Hellfire drive him.

verses.arabicText: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍۢ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًۭا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
verses.translationText: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."

verses.arabicText: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.translationText: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allah, the Most Great,

verses.arabicText: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
verses.translationText: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor.
